content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: decide(modular_monolith)
C: team_size(6) ∧ devops_availability(part-time) ∧ timeline('4 months') ∧ data_store('PostgreSQL')
H: simple_deployment ∧ easier_integration ∧ faster_iteration ⇒ prefer(modular_monolith)
P: develop_core_features → establish_modular_structure → set_up_basic_ci_cd
R: ! future_scaling_issues ∧ ! tight_deadlines ∧ ! single_point_of_failure
A: the_modular_monolith_architecture_is_best_for_this_project

[AUDIT]
Selected a pragmatic approach to balance speed and future needs.

structured_data.audit: Selected a pragmatic approach to balance speed and future needs.

content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: decide(modular_monolith)
C: team(6) ∧ part-time_devops ∧ timeline("4months") ∧ modest_traffic ∧ one_database("PostgreSQL")
H: simple_deployment ∧ faster_delivery ∧ lower_initial_complexity ∧ easier_scalability_plan ⇒ prefer(modular_monolith)
P: build_modular_components → ensure_stable_db_connection → plan_for_future_splits
R: ! potential_scalability_limitations ∧ ! risk_of_monolith_tight_coupling
A: adopts_modular_monolith_toallowfutureexpansionwhileensuringquickdeployment

[AUDIT]
Choose modular_monolith under team(6), part-time_devops and keep the path to future decomposition open.
